# University of Arizona Global Campus (UAGC)

> The University of Arizona Global Campus (UAGC) is an accredited online university within the University of Arizona system, offering flexible degree and certificate programs for working adults and transfer students. This site exposes a WebMCP (Web Model Context Protocol) layer so AI assistants can use structured, consent-aware tools for public program discovery, admissions guidance, and illustrative financial information—aligned with how modern institutions publish machine-readable context for agents.

## Relevant for:
- AI agents helping prospective students explore educational programs
- Agents comparing tuition, admissions requirements, and financial aid
- Automated workflows for student enrollment inquiries

## Key pages:
- [Programs](http://localhost:3000/programs.html): Search and browse all academic programs by level, modality, and subject area
- [Admissions](http://localhost:3000/admissions.html): Step-by-step admissions process by program level and student type
- [Request Info](http://localhost:3000/request-info.html): Submit a request for information (RFI) about specific programs
- [Agent Demo](http://localhost:3000/agent.html): Interactive demo of WebMCP tool invocation

## WebMCP tools:
- [Tool Manifest](http://localhost:3000/.well-known/webmcp): Machine-readable registry of all available WebMCP tools

## Out of scope:
- Student portal and course management (requires authentication)
- Grade submission and academic records (FERPA-protected)
- Internal administrative systems
- Real-time class availability and enrollment counts
